description: Replace the bundled arm64-v8a libnativestub.so with a rebuilt binary. ChangeClassifier has no packaging story for a changed native library - it's an UNSUPPORTED_FILE_CHANGED fallback (see ChangeClassifierTest's 'native library under jniLibs falls back honestly'), so this must route to a full Gradle rebaseline rather than be served as a quick build (D7's '.so change routes to REBASELINE').
